prompts.prompt: 一张从昏暗的大学阶梯教室观众席拍摄的写实照片，镜头越过前景中三名学生的后脑勺，望向巨大的投影屏幕。投影屏幕呈现出分为三个独立垂直面板的布局。左侧面板显示垂直的 {argument name="left game" default="地铁跑酷游戏画面"}，画面中一个角色在铁轨上奔跑并收集金币，带有显示分数为 "001022" 的 UI 元素。宽大的中央面板显示一张学术演示 Slides，标题为 "{argument name="slide topic" default="9.3：无穷几何级数"}"。幻灯片包含数学文本："例 3：求无穷几何级数的和。1/3 - 1/9 + 1/27 - 1/81 + ... 解：该级数为几何级数，其中 a = 1/3 且 r = -1/3。由于 |r| < 1，该无穷几何级数收敛。S = a / (1 - r) = (1/3) / (1 - (-1/3)) = (1/3) / (4/3) = 1/4。级数之和为 1/4。" 幻灯片页脚显示 "{argument name="professor name" default="Larson 博士"}"、"{argument name="course name" default="微积分 II"}"、"2024 年 11 月 14 日" 以及 "7 / 35"。右侧面板显示垂直的 {argument name="right game" default="我的世界跑酷游戏画面"}，展示了草地景观上方的浮动木块，右下角带有 TikTok 水印。房间装有吊顶，屏幕边缘后方可见黑板。

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 粉彩短发女孩人像
prompts.prompt: Create a soft pastel anime-style illustration of three young women sitting close together in a dreamy pink bedroom, framed as a waist-up group portrait in a 3:2 horizontal canvas. The scene has warm morning backlight from a window on the left, sheer curtains, a vase with pink tulips on the windowsill, a bed or sofa with lavender bedding, and a softly blurred wall with small cute framed pictures and posters on the right. Show exactly three girls, all with very short hair variations: the left girl is completely bald with a smooth shaved head, the center girl has an ultra-short brown buzz cut with visible stubble texture, and the right girl has a short dark pixie/buzz cut with spiky texture. Their faces are covered by flat pale pink rectangular censor blocks, one rectangle per girl, matching the soft color palette. Outfit details: the left girl wears a pale pink ribbed cardigan over a white lace camisole with small pink bows, a muted plaid skirt, and dangling flower earrings while touching her ear; the center girl wears a cream cable-knit cardigan with buttons and tiny bows over a white frilled blouse tied with a pale pink ribbon; the right girl wears a white blouse with a frilled collar and black ribbon bow under a pink plaid pinafore dress, with a small dangling earring. Use delicate linework, soft watercolor shading, luminous highlights, blush-pink atmosphere, cozy feminine fashion, high-detail fabric textures, and gentle depth of field. Keep the mood intimate, cute, and serene. Customize the three hair styles as {argument name="hair styles" default="left bald, center ultra-short brown buzz cut, right short dark pixie buzz cut"}, the setting as {argument name="bedroom setting" default="soft pink bedroom with tulips, sheer curtains, lavender bedding, and cute wall pictures"}, the outfit palette as {argument name="outfit palette" default="pale pink, cream, white, lavender, and muted plaid"}, the face covering as {argument name="face covering" default="flat pale pink rectangular censor blocks over each face"}, and the lighting as {argument name="lighting" default="warm hazy morning backlight from the left"}.

prompts.title: 个人资料/头像 - 速写本绘画活过来
prompts.prompt: In the center of the frame, a massive, oversized spiral-bound {argument name="object" default="sketchbook"} stands vertically upon a rustic, weathered dark-wood workbench. On the paper, a giant, realistic graphite pencil sketch of a man’s face is depicted. In a mind-bending moment, the thick paper of the sketchbook is violently torn open from the inside. A person is captured in mid-motion, stepping through the jagged, white-edged tear from the two-dimensional drawing into the three-dimensional world. The person’s right hand is firmly gripping the edge of the torn paper as they stride forward, with one foot planted on the wooden table and the other still emerging from the book. The lighting is cinematic and dramatic, provided by a single warm overhead industrial lamp that casts long shadows and creates a high-contrast, moody atmosphere. The person is dressed in a specific outfit: a {argument name="shirt" default="light blue and white pinstriped button-down shirt"} worn open over a plain white crew-neck t-shirt. A textured, brown leather-style crossbody sling bag is worn across the chest. They are wearing classic medium-wash blue slim-fit jeans and clean, white leather sneakers. A black digital watch is visible on their left wrist. The surrounding environment is rich with detail: scattered across the scarred wooden workbench are thick charcoal pencils, a speckled ceramic mug, a stack of vintage leather-bound books, and a metal palette. In the soft-focus background, a corkboard is pinned with various tubes of oil paint, and a ceramic jar filled with assorted artist brushes sits nearby. The overall mood is one of creative intensity and a powerful transition from art to reality, captured with high-fidelity textures and a shallow depth of field. However, there is one critical instruction: for the subject person, you MUST use the exact {argument name="reference" default="face and likeness"} of the person in the provided image. Preserve their identity and facial features perfectly. Integrate this person seamlessly into the described scene.

prompts.title: 产品营销 - 写实身份证
prompts.prompt:
Ultra-realistic 16:9 close-up studio photograph of a {argument name="country" default="Russian Federation"} citizenship identity card placed on a clean light grey or white background. The card is horizontally aligned, centered in frame, captured in sharp macro focus with soft diffused studio lighting.
The design follows an official government-issued ID aesthetic with structured typography, layered anti-counterfeit detailing, and engraved security graphics inspired by modern national identity cards.
Large bilingual header at top reads: “РОССИЙСКАЯ ФЕДЕРАЦИЯ” with secondary title “КАРТА ГРАЖДАНИНА / CITIZENSHIP CARD.”
Top-left corner features the {argument name="coat of arms" default="Russian double-headed eagle"} coat of arms on a red shield background. Upper-right includes the national flag.
The card contains a passport-style portrait of a {argument name="identity" default="young Russian woman"}:
– Fair Eastern European skin tone with subtle natural freckles
– Medium-length ash brown to dark blonde hair with soft waves
– Grey-blue eyes, neutral expression, direct gaze
– Minimal makeup, realistic facial texture
– Wearing a dark navy blazer or black top with subtle gold jewelry
Personal identity information displayed in Russian and English:
– Фамилия / Surname: ИВАНОВА / IVANOVA
– Имя / Given Names: АНАСТАСИЯ СЕРГЕЕВНА / ANASTASIA
– Дата рождения / Date of Birth: 12.03.1992
– Место рождения / Place of Birth: МОСКВА / MOSCOW
– Гражданство / Nationality: РОССИЙСКАЯ ФЕДЕРАЦИЯ / RUSSIAN FEDERATION
– № гражданства / Citizenship No.: RUS-1234567
– Дата выдачи / Date of Issue: 20.05.2024
– Действителен до / Date of Expiry: 20.05.2034
– Пол / Sex: Ж / F
Security and design features include:
– Intricate guilloche security patterns across the entire card surface

– Holographic foil patches with iridescent rainbow reflections
– Transparent layered security overlays
– Circular “RUS” holographic security seal
– Large engraved illustration of the Kremlin towers and Saint Basil’s Cathedral across the right side
– Faint Russian double-headed eagle watermark integrated into background
– Machine-readable identity strip at the bottom edge
– Signature at bottom: “Иванова А. С.”
Additional design styling:
– Soft red, blue, and silver-grey gradients inspired by the Russian flag
– Polycarbonate laminated material with realistic reflections and embossed texture
– High-security official document aesthetic with engraved banknote-style artwork
Lighting is soft and evenly diffused, emphasizing holographic effects, engraved textures, and realistic print detail without harsh shadows. No hand visible.

prompts.title: 横幅设计变体布局
Landscape Architecture Board
prompts.prompt: a 3:4 vertical, competition-grade landscape architecture presentation board. The board blends photorealistic aerial rendering with refined architectural diagram language, in the style of a high-end international landscape competition submission. Mood: calm, atmospheric, regenerative, ecological, scientific yet poetic. Layout (three stacked zones): 1. Top zone: analytical ecological diagrams and mapping overlays. 2. Middle zone: a large aerial landscape rendering as the primary focal image. 3. Bottom zone: a continuous sectional cut through the ecological landscape system. Top analytical zone: • Simplified ecological maps with soft, transparent color overlays. • Ultra-thin linework in white and pale gray. • Diagrams of water flow, circulation systems, ecological networks, habitat zones, and landscape connectivity. • Dashed lines for movement and flow. • Minimal annotations and soft ecological icons. • Floating overlay effect sitting above the rendering. • Very light pastel tones, high transparency, clean spacing, no dense clutter. Middle aerial rendering: • Bird's-eye view of an ecological restoration landscape. • Wetlands, ponds, flowing water systems, vegetation patches, bioswales, regenerative terrain. • Soft, slightly desaturated palette of greens, browns, and muted water blues. • Atmospheric depth with subtle haze in the distance. • Gentle human and ecological activity: walking paths, birds, small environmental interactions. • Wide landscape depth, smooth terrain transitions, calm cinematic environmental lighting. • Soft paper-texture finish integrated into the rendering. Bottom sectional cut: • Continuous section through terrain and ecological systems. • Soil layers, hydrology, groundwater movement, vegetation roots, ecological restoration processes, water filtration systems. • Thin white or pale linework, muted tones, minimal color. • Arrows indicating water movement and ecological flow. • Elegant architectural drafting quality, seamlessly merged into the board. Diagram language: extremely thin and precise linework, slightly softened edges (no harsh vector look), minimal labels, clean scientific notation, soft ecological symbols, balanced between scientific clarity and poetic visualization. Color system: • Base: desaturated greens, earthy browns, muted blue water tones. • Overlay: pale green, soft cyan, light beige, translucent pastel layers. • Avoid saturated accents, harsh contrast, bright reds, or overly graphic colors. Texture and atmosphere: soft atmospheric rendering, slight environmental haze, diffused lighting, subtle paper-grain or printed board texture, refined competition-board aesthetic. Format: 3:4 vertical architectural competition board composition. #AIart #GPTImage2

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 东京夜景立体地图
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a highly detailed 3D miniature diorama map titled {argument name="map title" default="TOKYO — NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE"}, showing Tokyo at night as a physical architectural landscape archive model with glowing city lights, raised buildings, roads, rail lines, waterways, and landmark labels.

Canvas: Landscape 3:2 composition, viewed from an elevated oblique angle like a museum display table. The map sits on a dark tabletop as a thick rectangular board with beveled edges, a dark navy-black base, thin cream border lines, and a printed coordinate grid.

Main scene: A dense nocturnal cityscape of {argument name="city" default="Tokyo"} rendered as a miniature urban model. Use thousands of tiny buildings and warm window lights, fine street networks, rail corridors, expressways, and dark blue water surfaces. The overall feeling should be a premium physical map texture, not a flat digital map: raised terrain-like urban fabric, tiny architectural blocks, engraved labels, and realistic depth.

Landmarks and labels: Include exactly 10 black label plaques with bilingual Japanese/English styling, placed over the city: 1) Shinjuku, 2) Ueno, 3) Asakusa, 4) Tokyo Skytree, 5) Imperial Palace, 6) Shibuya, 7) Tokyo Tower, 8) Ginza, 9) Odaiba, 10) Tokyo Bay. Make Tokyo Tower glow orange near the center-left, Tokyo Skytree glow blue-violet on the right, the Imperial Palace appear as a large dark green park enclosure near the center, and Rainbow Bridge span the bay in the lower right.

Grid and map markings: Add a printed grid around the map with numbered columns 1 through 10 along the top and lettered rows A through E down the left side. Add subtle latitude and longitude markings along the edges. Use thin cream cartographic lines and small technical annotations.

Bottom information band: Along the bottom edge, create a wide printed legend and archive panel divided into sections. Include exactly 6 legend line items with colored line samples: 1) Yamanote Line, 2) Chuo Line, 3) Ginza Line, 4) Asakusa Line, 5) Yurikamome Line, 6) Water. Include a center title block reading {argument name="map title" default="TOKYO — NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE"}, with subtitle text “Landscape Archive Model” and archive code {argument name="archive code" default="TKY-NAM-2024-001"}. Add a scale bar labeled 1:25,000 and a north arrow in the lower right. Add a small index grid with cells labeled A1 through E5.

Visual style: Cinematic macro photography of a handcrafted architectural model, ultra-detailed, sharp foreground, slight atmospheric haze, realistic miniature lighting, warm gold and cool blue contrast, premium museum exhibit aesthetics, dark navy and charcoal color palette with cream typography. Emphasize layered landmarks, physical map textures, and consistent architectural-diorama language.

Constraints: Keep the image free of people and vehicles as dominant subjects. Do not add extra landmark labels beyond the 10 listed. Avoid cartoon styling, flat infographic aesthetics, or modern app UI elements. Make all text appear printed or as small physical plaques on the map board.

Goal: Create a vertical Japanese 4-panel manga comic about a cute chibi girl becoming even more excited when a rainy sports day is postponed.

Canvas: Tall vertical comic page in full color, approximately 9:16, with a white outer margin and thick black panel borders. Use exactly 4 stacked horizontal panels of equal width, manga-style composition, energetic expressions, glossy digital coloring, bold outlines, dramatic speed lines, sparkles, and sound effects.

Main character: A single chibi elementary-school girl named {argument name="character name" default="purple-haired girl"}. She has long wavy lavender-purple hair, pale skin, round gray eyes that turn into sparkling star eyes when excited, rosy cheeks, and a small open mouth. She wears a pale pink short-sleeve blouse with buttons, a light beige skirt, white socks, and simple shoes. Her pose is usually fists clenched near her chest in excitement or surprise.

Panel 1: School sports day setup under stormy clouds. Show the girl standing large in the center of a school athletic field, smiling with clenched fists and sparkles around her. Background includes a school building, Japanese flag, strings of international flags, a clock, a flower-decorated sports day arch labeled 「運動会」, tents, cones, bags, and lunch boxes. Add a large vertical speech bubble on the right with 「今日は運動会！」. At the very top outside or above the first panel, add the headline: {argument name="headline text" default="雨が空ごとプールに変わっても、楽しみは10倍に跳ね上がる！"}.

Panel 2: Indoor announcement scene. Show a wall-mounted gray loudspeaker on the left, a taped white notice below it reading 「雨で延期」, and the girl on the right in close-up looking shocked with a sweat drop, clenched fist, and wide open mouth. Add a speech bubble on the right reading 「延期!?」. Use beige indoor wall tones and manga burst lines radiating from her face.

Panel 3: Torrential rain on the sports field. Show the athletic field transformed into a shallow flooded pool under heavy rain, lightning, dark storm clouds, and dramatic water splashes. The girl stands in the foreground with star-shaped eyes and an amazed open mouth, holding a spiral-bound calendar that reads 「運動会（新しい日）」 with a large red circled 「7」 and 「日後！」 underneath. Add two sound effects: blue 「ザーッ」 for heavy rain on the left and orange 「ゴロゴロ」 for thunder on the upper right. Add a vertical speech bubble on the right reading 「あと7日!?」.

Panel 4: Extreme close-up celebration. Fill the panel with the girl's happy face, sparkling star eyes, open smiling mouth, and clenched fists. Use a hot pink and red radial burst background filled with yellow sparkles. Add one jagged speech bubble on the left containing 「100倍!!」 in red and 「楽しみ」 in black, meaning the excitement is multiplied.

Text count and placement: Include exactly 1 headline, exactly 4 comic panels, exactly 4 speech bubbles, exactly 1 taped notice, exactly 1 calendar page, exactly 2 manga sound effects, and exactly 1 sports day arch label. Preserve all Japanese text exactly as written. Avoid adding extra dialogue, captions, logos, watermarks, or additional characters.

Visual style: Cute Japanese chibi manga, bright saturated colors, clean black line art, expressive faces, playful dramatic exaggeration, polished webcomic look, high readability of all Japanese text.

prompts.prompt: 一款为 {argument name="destination" default="马来西亚"} 设计的奢华旅游海报，采用竖版艺术旅行广告风格，背景为干净的象牙白纹理，并带有精致的浮雕装饰图案。画面构图围绕一条飘逸的红金相间蜡染丝带展开，丝带呈对角线螺旋贯穿页面，形成优雅的 S 型曲线，巧妙地串联起如梦似幻的地标、文化与自然景观拼贴。左上角，温暖的金色晨曦洒在云雾缭绕的热带山脉和雨林之上，瀑布飞流直下，茂密的棕榈树旁，一只巨大的犀鸟栖息在木槿花和白色热带花卉间。上方中央，吉隆坡天际线在薄雾中升起，以双峰塔（Petronas Twin Towers）为主体，隐约可见吉隆坡塔（KL Tower）及多座现代摩天大楼。右上角附近漂浮着 1 只色彩斑斓的传统月亮风筝（Wau kite），在留白的背景中格外醒目。中左侧包含 1 座坐落在棕榈树与烟雾中的宏伟清真寺，拥有多个圆顶和尖塔。中右侧包含历史悠久的苏丹阿都沙末大厦（Sultan Abdul Samad Building），展现其铜制圆顶与钟楼。左下方包含 1 列穿行于城市中的红银相间高架列车。底部中央展示 1 座装饰华丽的唐人街牌坊，标有“Jalan Petaling”字样，点缀着红灯笼和熙熙攘攘的行人。右下方描绘了黑风洞（Batu Caves）区域，包括 1 座高耸的金色姆鲁干神像和 1 条通往石灰岩悬崖的陡峭彩虹阶梯，周围人群攒动。右下角点缀着 1 座景观城市公园，配有绿松石色的湖泊与喷泉。紫色兰花和热带花卉穿插在丝带与前景的多处。最右下角展示 1 位身着红金服饰的传统舞者，正舞动着丝带的末端。整幅拼贴画应呈现出明亮、超细节、宏伟且充满庆典感的氛围，将写实建筑与绘画感旅行海报风格相结合，辅以柔和的云雾、大气层薄雾和发光高光。左下方添加优雅的海报排版：主标题为 {argument name="headline text" default="VISIT MALAYSIA 2026"}，较小的地点行显示为 {argument name="location text" default="KUALA LUMPUR"}，蓝色的手写体旅游标语为 {argument name="tagline" default="Malaysia Truly Asia"}，下方附带一行精致的小副标题：{argument name="subheading" default="Where Diversity Converges\nKuala Lumpur, City of Wonders\nThe Heart of Asia"}。采用金色、深红、象牙白、祖母绿、天蓝和热带绿的高端配色方案，呈现出精美的编辑级构图与高端目的地品牌美学。

prompts.title: 个人资料/头像 - 极繁可爱天使贴纸拼贴
prompts.prompt: Create an ultra-kawaii anime illustration in a bright Harajuku decora / yume-kawaii style. A single chibi angel girl stands centered, filling most of a wide 16:9 canvas, surrounded by an overwhelming collage of pastel stickers, charms, beads, bows, hearts, stars, candy, flowers, and sparkles. The character has very long fluffy {argument name="hair color" default="pale pink-blonde"} twin-tail hair with many tiny braids and bead strands, decorated with daisies, purple flowers, heart charms, pearl chains, and glitter accessories. She wears a frilly pastel {argument name="outfit color" default="lavender and white"} dress with layered ruffles, a large bow at the chest, heart jewelry, bracelets, and small white angel wings partly visible behind her. Her right hand reaches toward the viewer in a foreshortened open-palm pose, while her left hand holds a small pink-and-blue cylindrical wand or lip-gloss-like charm. Cover the center of her face with a large plain square pastel censor/placeholder block, soft blush-pink with no features, positioned from forehead to chin, making the face intentionally hidden while the hair and accessories remain visible around it. The background is extremely dense, saturated, and playful, with cyan, hot pink, lavender, yellow, and white as the dominant colors, glossy highlights, confetti, bubbles, starbursts, and sticker outlines. Include exactly 6 readable pop-art sticker texts: “LOVE!” in a cloud bubble at upper left, “WOW!” in a blue bubble on the left, “KIRA KIRA!” in a pink bubble at upper right, “Chu!” in a teal-and-pink bubble on the right, “YEAH!” in a yellow bubble at lower right, and “Angel” inside a neon heart at the top right. Add numerous non-text decorative stickers including a blue checkered bow, pink hearts, yellow stars, lollipops, ribbons, wings, and candy shapes, all with thick white sticker borders. The image should feel cute, chaotic, glossy, magical, and sparkly, like a maximalist Japanese idol sticker collage. High detail, clean anime line art, soft shading, luminous pastel glow, crisp sticker typography, no watermark, no extra text beyond the 6 specified words.

prompts.title: 日式中餐外卖传单
prompts.prompt:
Japanese neighborhood Chinese restaurant delivery flyer for mailbox posting (3:4 aspect ratio). Designed to look like a double-sided B5 print.

Flyer characteristics (following the grammar of real delivery flyers):
- Flashy red and yellow color scheme.
- Large text at the top: "Delivery Available! {argument name="shop name" default="Mona-Hanten"}" (shadowed Gothic font).
- An illustration of a {argument name="character" default="Chinese girl in a red cheongsam with a brown short bob"} holding ramen and saying "Welcome!" in a speech bubble.
- A menu photo grid (4x3) featuring various dishes: different types of ramen, fried rice, gyoza, sweet and sour pork, shrimp in chili sauce, mapo tofu, liver and leek stir-fry, tenshinhan, twice-cooked pork, spring rolls, annin tofu, and fried rice sets.
- Names and prices for each dish.
- A large yellow banner saying "Free delivery on all menu items over ¥1,000!".
- "Order by phone! ☎ 072-XX-XXXX" emphasized with a red circle.
- Business hours "11:00-22:00 (Closed on Tuesdays)".
- Delivery area map (simple schematic map).
- Coupon (perforated line for clipping): "One free plate of gyoza with this flyer!".

Texture of cheap paper printing. Includes fold marks. Precision that could be mistaken for a real Japanese delivery flyer.

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 雾霭春山村落
prompts.prompt: Create a museum-quality realistic landscape photograph inspired by {argument name="source material" default="an ancient Chinese poetic description of a hidden spring mountain village"}. Show a high, elevated viewpoint from a rocky pine-covered cliff looking down into a secluded valley village in {argument name="season" default="early spring"}. The composition features layered blue-green mountains receding into mist, a broad winding river in the far left background, and a smaller clear stream curving through the right side of the valley. In the middle ground, place a small traditional rural Chinese settlement with dark tiled roofs, scattered farm plots, footpaths, and orchards filled with pale pink and white blossoms. Count the visible major landscape elements as exactly 6: one foreground rocky cliff with pine branches, one central village, one blossom-filled orchard belt, one small winding valley stream, one distant broad river, and one layered misty mountain backdrop. Use soft morning light after rain, drifting low fog, luminous haze, wet greenery, and a tranquil atmosphere as if captured by a top National Geographic landscape photographer. The image should feel like a real, collectible fine-art photograph rather than an illustration: natural colors, deep depth, atmospheric perspective, crisp foreground texture, delicate highlights on the blossoms, no people, no animals, no modern buildings, no roads, no power lines, no text or watermark. Use a wide horizontal frame, approximately {argument name="aspect ratio" default="4:3"}, with cinematic realism and subtle Chinese shanshui sensibility.

prompts.title: 复古机密案件档案
prompts.prompt: 一张俯视视角的电影级静物照，展示了深色木桌上一份复古的机密调查档案，画面居中并占据大部分空间。展示一叠 3 个磨损的马尼拉文件夹，带有陈旧的米色纸张、磨损的边缘、细微的污渍和逼真的纸张纹理。最上方的文件夹是视觉焦点，左上角用 1 个超大号银色回形针固定。顶部中央用粗体黑色等宽字体打字显示标题 {argument name="headline text" default="CONFIDENTIAL – CASE FILES"}，下方有一条细水平线。添加 2 个红色橡胶印章标记：一个在右上角附近，略微倾斜地印着 "CONFIDENTIAL"；另一个在右下角的方框印章，印着 "HANDLING INSTRUCTIONS DO NOT COPY – DO NOT DISTRIBUTE"。在文件夹堆叠的右侧边缘，显示 1 个带标签的侧边栏，上面写着 "CASE FILE NO."，下方有一条粗黑色的涂改遮盖条。页面格式仿照旧式打字机打印的政府文件，带有清晰的黑色墨迹、略显不齐的打字机对齐方式，以及许多遮盖关键细节的粗黑色涂改条。准确包含 5 个编号部分："1. SUBJECT INFORMATION"、"2. CASE SUMMARY"、"3. DETAILS"、"4. ASSOCIATES / CONTACTS" 和 "5. REMARKS"。在页眉区域，包含以下字段："CASE FILE NO.:"（带黑色涂改条）、"DATE OPENED:"（后接 {argument name="date opened" default="March 14, 20___"}）、"PREPARED BY:"（带黑色涂改条）、"DEPARTMENT:"（后接 {argument name="department" default="Internal Investigations Unit"}）以及 "CLASSIFICATION:"（后接 {argument name="classification" default="CONFIDENTIAL"}）。在第 1 部分中，包含 6 个字段："NAME:"、"ALIASES:"、"DATE OF BIRTH:"、"PLACE OF BIRTH:"、"LAST KNOWN ADDRESS:" 和 "OCCUPATION:"，每个字段后均跟随长度不一的黑色涂改条。在第 2 部分中，添加一段简短的打字机风格案件摘要文本，并在句子流中嵌入 5 个独立的黑色涂改条。在第 3 部分中，添加第二段详细文本，并在段落中嵌入 4 个独立的黑色涂改条。在第 4 部分中，包含一个 3 列的表格，标签分别为 "NAME"、"RELATIONSHIP" 和 "NOTES"，共 3 行填充内容，每个单元格的内容均被黑色涂改条覆盖。在第 5 部分中，添加一句关于敏感信息和未经授权披露的简短警告。使用温暖的深褐色光线，文件夹边缘周围有柔和的阴影，带有细微的晕影，营造出一种忧郁的黑色电影档案氛围。图像应具有逼真、触感真实、神秘且略带灰尘的感觉，就像为犯罪惊悚片或世界观构建道具拍摄的机密侦探档案。

prompts.title: 漫画/故事板 - 暗黑玫瑰女神速写本拼贴
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a dense anime fashion sketchbook character sheet / fan-art collage for a {argument name="aesthetic title" default="dark rose goddess"}, showing one glamorous young woman in many poses and detail studies, surrounded by roses, petals, doodles, and handwritten admiration notes.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 poster, off-white paper background, monochrome ink-and-watercolor look with deep violet, black, and muted gray tones. The composition should feel like a messy but beautiful artist notebook page packed edge-to-edge with sketches.

Subject details: The same elegant woman appears throughout: very long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown-black"} hair, pale skin, delicate slender body, black nail polish, and a romantic gothic evening dress in {argument name="dress color" default="deep violet-black"}. The dress has sheer layers, a high slit, translucent stockings, dark heels, and many sculpted {argument name="flower motif" default="black roses"} around the bodice, waist, and skirt. Keep her face softly anonymized/featureless with pale blurred rectangular face areas where the face would be, while still showing hair, pose, clothing, and body language.

Layout and counted elements: Include exactly 16 depictions of the same character: 1 large reclining full-body pose in the upper left, 1 large bust portrait near the top center, 1 cropped side-profile hair study at the upper right, 1 loose back-of-hair sketch near the upper middle, 1 central full-body standing pose with one leg visible through the slit, 1 large three-quarter side/back upper-body pose in the middle right, 1 small full-body standing pose near the lower center, 1 seated side/back pose on the right, 1 large flowing-hair side portrait at the lower left, and 7 tiny chibi versions scattered along the bottom and side margins, including one labeled as the artist/fan saying “me.” Also include exactly 4 non-character detail studies: 1 realistic eye close-up, 1 elegant hand close-up with black nails, 1 back-of-dress detail sketch, and 1 rose cluster study.

Decorations: Scatter dark roses, loose petals, tiny hearts, sparkles, arrows, underlines, swirls, and small crown doodles throughout the page. Use expressive pencil lines, layered hatching, rough sketch marks, and transparent watercolor washes. The page should look spontaneous, stylish, and slightly chaotic but still balanced.

Handwritten text content: Add exactly 18 handwritten English notes in a casual fan-girl sketchbook style: “{argument name="main handwritten title" default="dark rose goddess"}”, “so pretty it hurts!!!”, “she’s not real TT”, “MY QUEEN.”, “I would follow her into the moonlit night”, “that profile tho... insane”, “hair goals”, “she doesn’t need to try”, “still stunning”, “those eyes”, “soft but lethal.”, “smol but will destroy you”, “HOW IS SHE EVEN REAL”, “the dress the pose the aura I’m GONE.”, “violet & roses forever”, “back detail”, “I wish I could draw her forever”, and “me”. Keep the handwriting dark purple/black, uneven, cute, and surrounded by arrows and tiny hearts.

Visual style: Japanese anime-inspired fashion illustration, loose ink sketch, watercolor wash, romantic gothic lolita / dark rose couture mood, high detail, expressive hair strands, elegant feminine poses, dramatic fabric folds, deep violet shadows, black rose accents, white paper texture. Avoid clean vector art, avoid photorealism, avoid extra characters, avoid extra text beyond the listed notes.
tags: 漫画 / 故事板 - 暗黑玫瑰女神速写本拼贴

prompts.title: 6 格喜剧漫画页面
程序员复古黄历海报
四格漫画页面生成器
信息图 / 教育视觉 - 像素故障结构信息图海报
prompts.prompt: Generate a structural graphic work around a specific theme. The subject is compressed into a large-scale monochromatic image field rather than a realistic object. Core shapes enter from the edges, crossing boundaries like fragments of a larger medium. The interior retains low-contrast image fragments, scan grain, halftone noise, and archival textures, with outer edges showing low-resolution mosaic steps and blocky fractures. The background uses high-brightness light-colored paper as a full field, cutting into the subject to create holes, paths, and negative space for reading pauses. Color maintains a three-layer functional relationship: large light background for breathing/cutting, large structural color for subject/pressure, and small high-contrast info color for titles/notes. The composition uses scale contrast between giant image fragments and tiny info points. Fonts are narrow modern sans-serif. Subject: {argument name="subject" default="Childhood of Hitler"}. Use: Infographic poster, ensuring all knowledge points are displayed. Ratio 16:9 landscape.
tags: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 像素故障结构信息图海报

prompts.title: GTA 风格海滩俱乐部游戏截图
prompts.prompt: 创作一张超逼真的开放世界犯罪类电子游戏截图，风格参考现代迈阿密风格的海滩俱乐部任务场景，画面呈现于明亮的午后阳光下，天空湛蓝。采用类似第三人称游戏视角的构图，前景中坐着 {argument name="character description" default="一位留着深色短发、肤色白皙的年轻男子，身穿纯黑色 T 恤和印花泳裤"}，他随意地坐在浅色沙滩上，身体微微侧向一旁，仿佛玩家视角在他身旁停下。将他置于画面左侧偏中心位置，占据较大比例，姿态自然放松。在他身后，描绘一个高档海滩俱乐部，沙滩上清晰可见 3 个带有飘逸窗帘的白色凉亭，种植着多棵高大的棕榈树，左侧是绿松石色的海水，右侧是一排具有装饰艺术风格的酒店，外墙呈柔和色调并带有霓虹装饰。海滩上布满了 12 位身着泳装的背景人群：有人站着聊天，有人在岸边行走，另有 2 人坐在右侧的餐桌旁享用餐饮。画面包含白色休闲家具、遮阳伞，营造出精致的社交派对氛围。添加逼真的游戏 HUD 界面：左下角是一个标有 {argument name="map label" default="GPS 路线"} 的方形小地图，右下角显示武器和控制图标，右上角显示金额为 {argument name="money amount" default="$45,670"} 的金钱计数器。整体观感应类似于次世代《Grand Theft Auto VI》的游戏截图，具有电影感且呈现出明显的游戏内质感，细节丰富、阴影真实、色彩分级充满活力的海岸气息，并带有 {argument name="city setting" default="罪恶都市"} 中那种微妙的奢华海滩讽刺感。

prompts.title: 健身 SaaS 着陆页 UI
prompts.prompt:
设计一个现代、高端的 {argument name="app type" default="健身应用"} 着陆页及产品 UI，品牌名称为 {argument name="brand name" default="PulseFit"}。

创建一个简洁的 Web 设计模型，使其看起来像一个真实的 SaaS 健身平台及配套移动端应用。设计风格应体现高端感、激励性且易于使用，UI/UX 风格需对标顶级健康与健身应用。

包含内容：
- 首屏板块：包含醒目的标题、简短的副标题、强有力的行动号召（CTA）按钮以及应用预览
- 仪表盘 UI：展示每日活动、消耗卡路里、锻炼连续天数、心率、步数及进度环
- 锻炼计划卡片：涵盖力量、有氧、灵活性及恢复训练
- 营养追踪板块：包含宏量营养素分析及饮水量记录
- 进度图表与分析组件
- 教练/社区板块：包含个人资料卡片及用户评价
- 定价板块及应用商店下载引导
- 移动端应用界面：与 Web 设计并列展示，呈现统一的产品生态系统

风格导向：
- 时髦、极简、现代的界面
- 高端健身品牌美学
- 舒适的间距、清晰的层级、圆角卡片、柔和阴影
- 深色模式 UI，搭配电光蓝、霓虹绿或活力橙等充满能量的强调色
- 清晰的排版、真实的图表、精致的按钮、美观的引导页体验

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - Cloudflare 全能邮件路由信息图
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a landscape hand-drawn notebook-style Chinese infographic explaining how to register multiple ChatGPT accounts by using Cloudflare Email Routing to create catch-all mailbox aliases.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 whiteboard page, clean off-white background, surrounded by a thick black dashed rounded border. Use a casual marker-and-pen sketch style with slightly imperfect lines, doodle arrows, stars, question marks, pins, and small expressive icons.

Title and intro: At the top center, write the bold headline {argument name="headline text" default="注册 ChatGPT 第 N 个账号：用 Cloudflare 造邮箱（手绘笔记）"}. Underline “Cloudflare” in blue. Beneath it on the left, write the pain point line: “痛点：同个邮箱只能注册一个账号，换邮箱麻烦。” Add a small curved arrow doodle and star near the title.

Main layout: Use exactly 7 main content boxes/cards plus decorative doodles. Arrange them left-to-right as a process with bold black arrows connecting sections. The 7 cards are: 1 pain card, 1 solution card, 1 core-principle card, and 4 numbered step cards.

Card 1, pain card: A red outlined sticky-note box on the upper left with a sad red face icon. Text: “想注册新号？没新邮箱！” Make it look like a folded-corner note.

Card 2, solution card: A blue rounded rectangle in the upper middle with a blue cloud icon. Text: “解决方案：Cloudflare Email Routing（邮箱路由）”. Put a blue arrow pointing toward the core principle box.

Card 3, core principle card: A large black-outlined rounded rectangle in the upper right. Header text: “核心原理：Catch-all（通配符 / 捕获所有）”. Include a funnel icon. Show exactly 4 example incoming aliases on the left: “chatgpt@”, “netflix@”, “test1@”, and “任意前缀@”. Draw arrows from all four into a large “@” symbol and “@你的域名.com”, then a thick black arrow to a mailbox icon labeled “真实邮箱（如 Gmail）”. Bottom line with green check icon: “全部自动转发，统一汇总！无需提前创建。”

Step cards along the bottom: Use exactly 4 numbered boxes.

Step 1 card, bottom left: Title “第一步：准备工作”. Include exactly 3 numbered requirements: “1. Cloudflare 账号（免费注册）”, “2. 你的域名（DNS 托管在 CF）”, “3. 真实邮箱（接收转发）”. Add a globe icon, a green check mark, and a yellow key icon. Below it add small text: “域名推荐：性价比高（如 top域名）”.

Step 2 card, bottom center-left: Title “第二步：启用并验证目标邮箱”. Include a small computer icon labeled “CF 控制台”. Text flow: “添加域名 → 解析 → 激活”. Draw an arrow down to a mini DNS nameserver panel with two columns: left “阿里云（修改 NS）”, right “Cloudflare（等待生效，状态：活动）”. Beneath the card, draw a red circled nameserver list with exactly 2 entries: “gene.ns.cloudflare.com” and “peyton.ns.cloudflare.com”. Add a small clock icon and text “约30分钟”.

Step 3 card, bottom center-right: Title “第三步：设置邮件路由”. Show a mini Cloudflare UI mockup with exactly 2 top tabs/boxes: “Email（电子邮件）” and “Email Routing（路由）”. Include a small “Get Started” button pointing to “绑定目标地址（Destination address）”. At the bottom add an envelope icon and text: “验证邮件 → 点击确认”. Under this card place a small blue status note titled “测试转发成功” with two arrow lines showing an alias forwarding to a Gmail address.

Step 4 card, bottom right: Title “第四步：设置路由规则（核心步骤）”. Show a UI panel titled “Catch-all 规则设置”. Include a blue toggle switch labeled “Active（启用）”. Include a two-row table with headers and values: row 1 “Action（操作）” to “Send to（发送至）”; row 2 “Destination（目标）” to “你的真实邮箱”. Add a red star near the corner.

Final result box: At the bottom right below Step 4, add a green rounded rectangle with a smiling face icon. Text: “效果：注册时随意编造前缀（例如 chatgpt@yourdomain.com）邮件全部统一汇总到真实邮箱，实现「邮箱自由」！全程免费！”

Visual style: Handwritten Chinese typography, thick black marker outlines, simple vector doodles, blue/red/green/yellow accent colors, informal classroom note-taking feel. Keep all arrows bold and directional, with minor sketchy imperfections.

Constraints: Keep the entire infographic in Chinese as specified, use no photorealism, no 3D rendering, no watermark, no extra sections beyond the 7 cards and final result box, and make the text legible.

prompts.title: 漫画/故事板 - 宇宙大爆炸打盹漫画
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a humorous four-panel cosmic comic strip about a godlike universe creator oversleeping and accidentally causing a messy Big Bang.

Canvas: Wide horizontal comic page, 16:9 aspect ratio, with four rectangular panels arranged in a 2-by-2 grid. Use thick black comic borders, slight perspective wobble, and a smoky grayscale outer background with glowing specks and sketchy crosshatch marks.

Visual style: Highly detailed painterly comic art with dramatic ink outlines, cosmic fantasy lighting, saturated nebula colors, stars, galaxies, explosions, and watercolor-like textures. The tone is funny, epic, and slightly chaotic. Add a deliberate blurred square over the godlike character’s face in each panel, as if censored or anonymized.

Main character: A long-haired, bearded, elderly cosmic wizard or deity wearing ornate purple robes patterned with stars and gold embroidered cuffs. He is sleepy and irritated, shown in bed or beside the alarm clock. Use {argument name="character name" default="anonymous cosmic creator"} only as an internal character concept, not visible text.

Panel layout and exact content:
1. Top-left panel: The cosmic creator sleeps under blankets in a bed floating in deep space. Beside the bed on a small wooden table sits a large vintage twin-bell alarm clock. The clock face clearly reads “BIG BANG” in bold black letters, with Roman numerals around the edge. Background filled with colorful nebula clouds and stars. No speech bubble.
2. Top-right panel: The alarm clock rings violently with motion lines. Add exactly two comic sound effects above it: “BEEEEEP!” on the left and “BEEEEP!” on the right, in yellow bold comic lettering with black outline. The creator reaches from the right side toward a small rectangular orange snooze button on a base in front of the clock. The button label reads “SNOOZE.” The clock face still reads “BIG BANG.”
3. Bottom-left panel: The creator is back asleep on the left while the clock on the bedside table is wrapped tightly in messy bandages or cloth, muffled and restrained. The universe behind it erupts with galaxies, stars, and colorful energy swirls. Add a small beige caption box in the upper right that reads exactly: “13.8 billion years pass...”
4. Bottom-right panel: The creator is awake and exasperated, pointing or gesturing toward the cosmic chaos. Behind him is a wild explosion of galaxies, starbursts, and nebula fragments. Add a glowing neon sign on the left that reads exactly: “Big Bang is a Mess.” with “Mess.” emphasized in red. Add one speech bubble above the creator that reads exactly: “DAMN..., I hit Snooze just once...”

Text content: Include exactly these visible text elements: “BIG BANG” on the alarm clock in panels 1, 2, and partially visible in panel 3; “BEEEEEP!”; “BEEEEP!”; “SNOOZE”; “13.8 billion years pass...”; “Big Bang is a Mess.”; and “DAMN..., I hit Snooze just once...”

Constraints: Use exactly four panels, exactly one recurring main character, exactly one alarm clock, exactly one snooze button, exactly one neon sign, and exactly one caption box. Keep all text legible and spelled as specified. Do not add extra panels, extra speech bubbles, watermarks, logos, or signatures.
